items.label: Dog
items.realWorldBridge: Go find a dog together — a real one, a photo, or a toy — and say 'dog.'

items.label: Cat
items.coPlayPrompt: Point and say 'Cat.' Can you say 'meow'?
items.realWorldBridge: Look for a cat outside or in a book and say 'cat' together.

items.label: Cow
items.realWorldBridge: Find a cow in a book or a toy and moo together.

items.label: Duck
items.realWorldBridge: Find some water and pretend to be ducks — 'quack!'

items.label: Bird
items.realWorldBridge: Go to a window and listen for a real bird together.

items.label: Fish
items.realWorldBridge: Find a fish in a book or pretend to swim like a fish.

items.label: Apple
items.realWorldBridge: Find a real apple in the kitchen and hold it together.

items.label: Banana
items.realWorldBridge: Find a banana and peel it together.

items.label: Bread
items.realWorldBridge: Find some bread in your kitchen and name it together.

items.label: Milk
items.realWorldBridge: Pour a little milk together and say 'milk.'

items.label: Carrot
items.realWorldBridge: Find a carrot in the fridge and crunch it together.

items.label: Egg
items.realWorldBridge: Find an egg in the kitchen and hold it gently together.

items.label: Car
items.realWorldBridge: Look out a window for a real car and say 'car.'

items.label: Bus
items.realWorldBridge: Watch for a bus together next time you go out.

items.label: Train
items.realWorldBridge: Find a train in a book or make a train with chairs.

items.label: Boat
items.realWorldBridge: Float a toy boat in the bath and say 'boat.'

items.label: Plane
items.realWorldBridge: Look up at the sky together for a real plane.

items.label: Bike
items.realWorldBridge: Find a real bike and say 'bike' together.

items.label: Ball
items.realWorldBridge: Find a real ball and roll it back and forth together.

items.label: Cup
items.realWorldBridge: Find your child's cup and say 'cup' together.

items.label: Book
items.realWorldBridge: Go pick a real book and read one page together.

items.label: Sock
items.realWorldBridge: Find a pair of socks and put one on together.

items.label: Clock
items.realWorldBridge: Find a real clock in your home and listen to it tick.

items.label: Key
items.realWorldBridge: Find your keys and jingle them together (gently!).
